title: RemediationStatus
description: The current position of an OER cleanup project within the documented remedial process, plus the determinations issued so far. This is the object returned by the getRemediationStatus operation — the single 'where does my cleanup stand?' answer that a developer, an inspecting agency (DOB, HPD), or an agent needs, and which today can only be reconstructed by reading documents in the EPIC portal. Assembled from cleanup-project.json + notice-to-proceed.json; no OER API or Open Data twin exists for live status.

oerProjectNumber.description: The OER project whose status this is.

eDesignation.description: The (E)-designation number under resolution, if any.

noticeToProceedIssued.description: Whether a Notice to Proceed / Decision Document has been issued.

noticeOfSatisfactionIssued.description: Whether a Notice of Satisfaction / Completion has been issued (cleanup closed out).

buildingPermitEligible.description: Derived: whether OER's sign-offs are far enough along for DOB to issue a building permit.

certificateOfOccupancyEligible.description: Derived: whether OER's requirements are satisfied to the point a certificate of occupancy may be granted.

determinations.description: The OER determinations issued on this project to date (NNO, NTP/Decision Document, NOS/Completion).

lastUpdated.description: When OER last updated this status.
